Core Nodes.name: Form

Core Nodes.name: Wait
Core Nodes.description: Pause execution until a time, condition, or external event is met.

Core Nodes.description: Use natural-language instructions to transform data with an LLM.

Core Nodes.name: Convert to File
Core Nodes.description: Turn JSON into binary (e.g., files) for downstream processing.

Core Nodes.name: Execute Workflow Trigger
Core Nodes.description: Orchestrate modular flows by invoking other workflows.

Core Nodes.name: Function
Core Nodes.description: Run one-off JavaScript to reshape or enrich items across the batch.

Core Nodes.name: Function Item
Core Nodes.description: Run JavaScript once per item for fine-grained transformations.

Core Nodes.description: React to file system changes and kick off workflows automatically.

Core Nodes.name: Edit Fields (Set)
Core Nodes.description: Add, remove, and update fields on items without writing code.

Core Nodes.name: Simulate Trigger
Core Nodes.description: Test and debug flows by simulating incoming trigger events.

Core Nodes.name: Interval
Core Nodes.description: Run a workflow on a recurring interval (e.g., every 5 minutes).

Core Nodes.name: Cron
Core Nodes.description: Schedule workflows at exact times with CRON expressions.

Core Nodes.description: Start a workflow when an RSS feed publishes new content.

Core Nodes.description: Run workflows on a fixed schedule without CRON.

Core Nodes.description: Fire on workflow lifecycle events such as activation or completion.

Core Nodes.description: Kick off a flow when you post a manual message in chat.

Core Nodes.name: Manual Trigger
Core Nodes.description: Start a run by clicking a button—perfect for ad-hoc tasks.

Core Nodes.name: Trigger
Core Nodes.description: Handle instance events and route them into workflows.

Core Nodes.name: Extract from File
Core Nodes.description: Convert binary files into JSON for processing.

Core Nodes.name: Read/Write Files from Disk
Core Nodes.description: Read or write files on the machine running the workflow.

Core Nodes.name: iCalendar
Core Nodes.description: Generate .ics calendar files from your workflow data.

Core Nodes.name: Markdown
Core Nodes.description: Convert between Markdown and HTML cleanly and safely.

Core Nodes.name: Edit Image
Core Nodes.description: Resize, blur, and annotate images directly in your flow.

Core Nodes.name: Merge
Core Nodes.description: Join streams and wait until all inputs are ready.

Core Nodes.name: Respond to Chat
Core Nodes.description: Post rich replies back to your chat channel.

Core Nodes.name: Read PDF
Core Nodes.description: Extract text and structure from PDFs for downstream steps.

Core Nodes.name: Stop and Error
Core Nodes.description: Intentionally fail the run with a clear error message.

Core Nodes.name: Write Binary File
Core Nodes.description: Persist binary data to disk as part of your workflow.

Core Nodes.name: Read Binary File
Core Nodes.description: Load a single binary file from disk into the workflow.

Core Nodes.name: Read Binary Files
Core Nodes.description: Load multiple binary files from disk at once.

Core Nodes.name: Start
Core Nodes.description: Define the explicit entry point for workflow execution.

Core Nodes.name: Execute Sub-workflow
Core Nodes.description: Call another workflow and continue when it completes.

Core Nodes.name: HTML
Core Nodes.description: Generate or transform HTML content programmatically.

Core Nodes.name: Compare Datasets
Core Nodes.description: Diff two inputs to detect additions, removals, and changes.

Core Nodes.name: Convert to/from binary data
Core Nodes.description: Move data between JSON and binary formats in either direction.

Core Nodes.name: Switch
Core Nodes.description: Route items based on expressions or rule sets.

Core Nodes.name: Aggregate
Core Nodes.description: Group and summarize fields across many items.

Core Nodes.name: Simulate
Core Nodes.description: Dry-run a node to validate logic without side effects.

Core Nodes.name: XML
Core Nodes.description: Convert data to and from XML cleanly.

Core Nodes.name: HTML Extract
Core Nodes.description: Parse HTML and extract fields with CSS-like selectors.

Core Nodes.name: Remove Duplicates
Core Nodes.description: Drop items with matching field values to keep data unique.

Core Nodes.name: Split Out
Core Nodes.description: Explode arrays into separate items for downstream steps.

Core Nodes.name: Sort
Core Nodes.description: Reorder items by one or more fields.

Core Nodes.name: Summarize
Core Nodes.description: Compute sums, counts, mins, and maxes across items.

Core Nodes.name: Filter
Core Nodes.description: Include or exclude items using simple conditions.

Core Nodes.name: If
Core Nodes.description: Branch execution based on a true/false condition.

Core Nodes.name: Loop Over Items (Split in Batches)
Core Nodes.description: Process large lists in manageable batches.

Core Nodes.name: Rename Keys
Core Nodes.description: Rename fields on items to match downstream schemas.

Core Nodes.name: Limit
Core Nodes.description: Restrict how many items move forward in a run.

Core Nodes.name: Tool Executor
Core Nodes.description: Run tools directly—no AI agent required.

Core Nodes.name: No Operation, do nothing
Core Nodes.description: Explicitly do nothing; use for clarity in complex flows.
